name: com.multinex/mnemosyne
title: Mnemosyne
description: Hosted and self-hosted MCP memory substrate for durable recall, replay, reflection, and benchmark-backed continuity. Hosted supports billing OAuth for authenticated users and bearer API keys for static clients.

_meta.benchmark_scope: Artifact-backed deterministic fixture benchmark: Mnemosyne conditions passed 3/3 while stateless and naive-memory controls passed 0/3.
